name: Scuttling Walker

src.description: Each time this model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move over friendly MONSTER and VEHICLE models and terrain features that are 4"or less in height as if they were not there.

note: terrain height limit 4" implied but not stated; applies during normal or advance move

name: Daemonic Allegiance

src.description:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the keywords below. Until the end of the battle, this model has that keyword and the additional wargear stated for that keyword below.

KHORNE - This model is additionally equipped with: torrent of burning blood

TZEENTCH - This model is additionally equipped with: warp gaze

NURGLE - This model is additionally equipped with: phlegm bombardment

SLAANESH - This model is additionally equipped with: scream of despair

note: completely wrong; describes keyword selection and wargear grant, not re-roll mechanic

name: Malefic Destruction

src.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s hellforged weapons.

note: applies to hellforged weapons only; once per battle limit not stated

name: Harbinger of Death

src.description:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities. Until the end of the phase, this model’s hellforged weapons have that ability:
■ [LETHAL HITS]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 1]

note: Missing selection mechanic; reads as all abilities apply simultaneously rather than per-fight choice.

name: Daemonic Lord

src.description: While this model is within 3"of one or more friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA INFANTRY units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

note: Inverts logic; should grant aura benefit when NEAR friendlies, not grant lone operative.

name: Unholy Vigour

src.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 3+ invulnerable save.

note: Omits battle limit (once per battle); '?+' unclear invulnerable save value.

name: Deadly Demise D6

src.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by D6.

note: Omits condition that trigger occurs on destruction; only implies end state.

name: Virulent Blessing (Psychic)

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24"and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA model is allocated to a model in that unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

note: Misses enemy selection and NURGLE-only restriction; grants aura effect instead of targeted damage bonus.

name: The Eternal Dance

src.description:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 6"of this model. Until the end of the phase:
■ Each time a friendly SLAANESH LEGIONES DAEMONICA model makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.
■ Each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

note: Aura scope wrong; should select one enemy unit, not apply broadly. Duration unclear.

name: Horrifying Beauty

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if that enemy unit is Below Half‑strength.

note: Below-half-strength condition misplaced; test forced on any unit in engagement range regardless.

name: Mischief Makers

src.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding TITANIC units) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

note: Scope wrong; applies to enemy fighting units, not all enemies. Misses TITANIC exclusion.

name: Leader

src.description: Before the battle, CHARACTER units with the Leader ability can be attached to one of their Bodyguard units to form an Attached unit.

note: Oversimplifies; attachment happens before battle, requires CHARACTER and Bodyguard unit.

name: Tranceweaver

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

note: Misses conditional re-roll benefit (objective marker range grants full re-roll).

name: Symphony of Pain (Psychic)

src.description: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12"of this model. Until the end of the turn, each time a SLAANESH LEGIONES DAEMONICA model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

note: Scope/trigger wrong; targets battle-shocked enemy unit, grants SLAANESH rerolls, not aura.

name: Eldritch Flames (Psychic)

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

note: Inverts mechanic; removes cover benefit rather than granting it after shooting.

name: Split

src.description: Each time a PINK HORROR or BLUE HORROR model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, if it was a PINK HORROR, add two BLUE HORROR models to this unit, and if it was a BLUE HORROR, add one BRIMSTONE HORROR model to this unit.

note: Blue horror returns brimstone not blue; condition nesting garbled; timing imprecise.

name: HORRORS ARE PINK. HORRORS ARE BLUE. WHERE ONCE THERE WAS ONE, NOW THERE ARE TWO.

src.description:
If, at any point, this unit contains no PINK HORROR models, use the BLUE HORRORS datasheet for this unit.

Designer’s Note:While this unit contains one or more PINK HORROR models, the Sullen Malevolence and Exploding Horrors abilities from the BLUE HORRORS datasheet do not apply to this unit.

note: Labeled flavor text; actually swaps datasheet when pink models destroyed; complex conditional.

name: Infected Outbreak

src.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

note: Completely wrong; should control objective marker persistently until opponent exceeds control.

name: No Prey Can Evade

src.description: You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

note: Only re-rolls charge, not advance; scope incomplete.

name: Monarch of the Hunt

src.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model’s quarry.

note: Misses quarry selection mechanic and first-round-only timing; always-active incorrect.

name: Slashing Dive

src.description: In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit:for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

note: Omits dice roll mechanic (1 mortal per 4+); suggests flat 1 damage.

name: Bane of Cowards

src.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

note: Misses mechanics; forces desperate escape tests and subtracts 1 if battle-shocked.

name: Daemon Lord of Tzeentch (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly TZEENTCH LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6"of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

note: Trigger incorrect (shooting phase not applicable); should modify ranged attack strength.

name: Master of Magicks (Psychic)

src.description: In your Shooting phase, select one of the following abilities:[IGNORES COVER]; [LETHAL HITS]; [SUSTAINED HITS D3]. Until the end of the phase, this model’s Bolt of Change has that ability.

note: Lists only two of three options; omits Sustained Hits D3; weapon-specific (Bolt of Change).

name: Storm of Mutating Sorcery (Psychic)

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Scope wrong (aura vs. targeted); only INF units affected; no test penalty.

name: Shroud of Flies (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6"of this FORTIFICATION, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

note: Duration wrong (battle round vs. battle); source fortification not unit.

name: Diseased Cover

src.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

note: Misses fortification check; should be visibility-based benefit, not phase-locked.

name: Fortification

src.description:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more FORTIFICATIONS from your army:

■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

note: Oversimplified; covers hit roll penalty but misses escape test exemption.

name: Nurgle’s Rot (Psychic)

src.description: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12"of this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

note: Duration misleading (permanent vs. until next movement phase).

name: Brass Stampede

src.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit:for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

note: Omits dice mechanic (D3 per 4+); suggests flat damage.

name: Soporific Musk

src.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

note: Misses mechanics; forces desperate escape and -1 if battle-shocked.

name: Murderlust

src.description: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

note: Includes fell back when only advance qualifier in official text.

name: Beast Handler

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit. In addition, once per battle, you can target that unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

note: Misses heroic intervention stratagem mechanic and battle-once limit.

name: Seed the Garden of Nurgle

src.description: At the end of your Movement phase, if this model is within one AREA TERRAIN Feature, until the end of the battle, that AREA TERRAIN feature is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

note: Oversimplified; marks area terrain as shadow of chaos if within it at movement end.

name: Swallow Energy (Psychic)

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

note: Misses mortal wounds and psychic attack scope; broad FNP granted.

name: Horrible Fascination (Psychic)

src.description: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, one PSYKER model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12"of and visible to that PSYKER model and roll one D6:on a 1, that PSYKER model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, that enemy unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

note: Completely wrong; timing (opponent's shooting), triggers vary (mortal/penalty/lockout), psyker-only.

name: Poxbringer

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

note: Inverted mechanic; should critical hit on 5+, not -5 to hit rolls.

name: Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic)

src.description: While an enemy unit is within 6"of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test.

note: Correct scope and aura size, but generated uses Leadership shorthand while official applies only to Battle-shock tests.

name: Rider of the Immaterial Winds

src.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

note: Missing trigger condition (end of opponent's turn, not in engagement range) and fails to convey the timing/conditional nature.

name: Death’s Heads

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

note: Missing target selection and faction restriction; only NURGLE units get re-roll benefit.

name: Relentless Carnage

src.description: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6:for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

note: Oversimplifies multi-roll mechanic (8D6 for 4+) into single wound; misses probability-based outcome.

name: Flames of Change (Psychic)

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks, and roll one D6. On a 4+, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is aflame. While a unit is aflame, subtract 2"from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

note: Generated says 'post attack debuff' which is vague; official debuff is specific (move/advance/charge penalties) and applies only on 4+, requires target selection.

name: Manifestation of Destruction

src.description: This model cannot be your WARLORD and cannot be given Enhancements.

note: Missing second part: cannot be given Enhancements.

name: Skullmaster’s Fury

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Juggernaut’s bladed horns equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

note: Missing trigger (must end Charge move first) and restricts to Juggernaut weapon, not all weapons.

name: Tally of Pestilence

src.description: Keep a tally of how many enemy models are destroyed by NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA models from your army during the battle. At the start of your Command phase, if this tally is 7 or more, you gain 1CP and the tally is reset to 0.

note: Missing entire trigger mechanism (track destroyed enemy models, reset at 7); oversimplified to unconditional CP gain.

name: Pack Leader

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

note: Generated only mentions charge re-rolls; official also allows re-rolling Advance rolls.

name: Prey of the Blood God

src.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s prey. Each time a model in this model’s unit makes a melee attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s prey is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model’s prey.

note: Missing prey-selection mechanic (first round only, then dynamic switching on destruction).

name: Brass Collar of Bloody Vengeance

src.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

note: Generated omits restriction: Feel No Pain 3+ only applies to Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds, not all damage.

name: Hysterical Frenzy

src.description: Each time a model in this model’s unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

note: Oversimplifies: not all destroyed models fight, only those that haven't fought this phase; conditional resurrection.

name: Skulls for Khorne

src.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER unit, you gain 1CP.

note: Generated omits second mechanic: gaining 1CP when destroying CHARACTER units.

name: Blood Throne

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 18"of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly KHORNE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

note: Missing S characteristic buff; selection mechanic not conveyed (must select target at start of phase).

name: Champion Slayer

src.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER or MONSTER unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER or MONSTER unit, this model regains up to D6 lost wounds.

note: Missing second mechanic: healing D6 wounds when destroying CHARACTER or MONSTER units.

name: Shadow of Khorne (Aura)

src.description: The area of the battlefield within 6"of this FORTIFICATION is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos. In addition, while a friendly KHORNE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6"of this FORTIFICATION, each time you take a Battle-shock test for that unit, you can re-roll that test.

note: Terrain tagging correct but generated structure unclear; scope restricted to friendly units of specific keywords.

name: Cover

src.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

note: Missing critical condition: model must not be fully visible to attacker; generic phrasing hides shooting-phase specificity.

name: Jolly Gutpipes

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

note: Generated omits Advance re-roll bonus.

name: Disease of Mirth (Aura)

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, every enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 6"of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Missing exclusion: does not affect MONSTERS and VEHICLES.

name: One Head Looks Forward

src.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for this model; if that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

note: Missing entire mechanic: 1CP gain conditional on passing Leadership test at end of Command phase.

name: One Head Looks Back (Aura)

src.description: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12"of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP (this is not cumulative with any other rules that would increase the CP cost of that Stratagem).

note: Completely wrong: has nothing to do with units with 'A' keyword; actually increases Stratagem costs for opponent.

name: Sullen Malevolence (Aura)

src.description: While an enemy unit is within 6"of this unit, if this unit contains one or more BLUE HORROR models, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.

note: Missing condition: only applies if unit contains BLUE HORROR models.

name: Exploding Horrors

src.description: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one or more BRIMSTONE HORROR models in this unit. For each BRIMSTONE HORROR model you select, roll one D6:on a 4+, that model is destroyed and that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

note: Fundamentally wrong: mechanic requires selecting BRIMSTONE HORROR models and rolling per model (4+ destroys), not automatic.

name: P’tarix’s Sorcerous Syphon (Aura)

src.description: While an enemy unit is within 12"of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a Psychic Attack, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

note: Missing scope restriction: only applies to Psychic Attacks by enemy.

name: Xirat’p’s Sorcerous Barrages (Psychic)

src.description: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6"of this model:on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

note: Generated says flat 1 mortal wound; official uses tiered rolls (1MW on 2-3, D3 on 4-5, D6 on 6).

name: Stealth

src.description: If every model in a unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack is made against it, subtract 1 from that attack's Hit roll.

note: Missing condition: only applies if every model in unit has this ability.

name: Formless Horror

src.description: Each time an enemy unit wishes to select this model as the target of an attack, that unit must first take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, in addition to being Battle-shocked, that enemy unit cannot target this model this phase.

note: Structure correct but generated phrasing opaque; requires understanding of battle-shock test consequences.

name: Altered Reality (Psychic)

src.description: Once per battle round, after a Hit roll, a Wound roll, or a saving throw is made for this model, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

note: Completely wrong: has nothing to do with '-6 to rolls'; actually changes roll results to unmodified 6 once per round.

name: Bounding Leaps

src.description: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

note: Missing specificity: only allows shooting when unit Fell Back, not general action after retreat.

name: Grotesque Regeneration

src.description: At the end of each phase, if a Beasts of Nurgle model in this unit has lost any wounds but is not destroyed, that model regains all of its lost wounds.

note: Generated condition complex and unclear; official simpler: if wounded but not destroyed, regain all wounds at end of phase.

name: Hunters from the Warp

src.description: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

note: Missing trigger timing: 'end of opponent's turn' should precede the Engagement Range check.

name: Collar of Khorne

src.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

note: Generated omits restriction: Feel No Pain 3+ only against Psychic Attacks, not all damage.

name: Skulls of the Fallen

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Missing timing clarification: test occurs after model shoots and selects a unit hit by those attacks.

name: Bounding Assault

src.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Pox Rider plagueswords equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

note: Missing weapon specificity: only Pox Rider plagueswords gain Lance.

name: GRANDFATHER'S BLESSING

src.description: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Beasts of Nurgle unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

note: Generated phrasing 'attached unit eligibility' obscure; actual mechanic allows Leaders to attach to Beasts of Nurgle/this unit interchangeably.

name: Pouncing Leap

src.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

note: Generated says 'refund CP' with unknown amount; actual mechanic allows Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, reusable.

name: Warp Spines

src.description: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

note: Oversimplifies tiered roll mechanic (2-3/D3, 4-5/3, 6/D3+3 mortal wounds) into flat D3 outcome.

name: The Shadow of Chaos
note: Generated trivializes massive mechanic: three separate zone rules plus two conditional subsystems (Manifestation/Terror) with multiple effects.

name: Daemonic Pact

src.description:
If every model from your army has the CHAOS KNIGHTS or HERETIC ASTARTES keyword, you can include LEGIONES DAEMONICA units in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. The combined points cost of such units you can include depends on your battle size, as shown below.

■ Incursion - Up to 250 pts
■ Strike Force - Up to 500 pts
■ Onslaught - Up to 750 pts

None of these models can be your WARLORD, and they cannot be given Enhancements.In addition, for each of the following keywords, the number of non-BATTLELINE units with that keyword you include in this way cannot be greater than the number of BATTLELINE units with that keyword you include in this way:

■ KHORNE
■ TZEENTCH
■ NURGLE
■ SLAANESH

note: Generated placeholder 'faction metadata' meaningless; official complex rule governing mixed-faction inclusion with point limits and restrictions.

name: Shadow Form Abilities

src.description: At the start of the battle round, select one Shadow Form ability. Until the end of the battle round, this model has that ability.

note: Generated 'modify stats' vague; actual mechanic selects one Shadow Form from options at start of battle round.

name: Emissary of the Great Mutator (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly Tzeentch Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

note: omits Tzeentch faction requirement

name: Deadly Demise D6+2

src.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by D6+2.

note: affects both friendly and enemy; should be enemy only

name: Emissary of the Blood God (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly Khorne Legiones Daemonica unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

note: omits Khorne faction requirement
